fields.name: Standard Task Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the standard task code.
The program automatically retrieves the standard task code from the Code field in the standard task table.
The program uses the standard task code to link the standard task quality measure with the standard task.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different standard task quality measure lines.

fields.name: Qlty Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the quality measure.

fields.name: Min. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum value that must be met.

fields.name: Max. Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum value that may be achieved.
